query:
SELECT p.id, p.numeroCnj, p.tipoAcao, p.statusProcesso, p.faseAtual, p.clienteId, c.nomeCompleto, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movimentacoes m WHERE m.processoId = p.id) as movs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estrategias e WHERE e.processoId = p.id) as estrats
FROM processos p JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id WHERE LOWER(c.nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maeve%' ORDER BY p.id;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movimentacoes m WHERE m.processoId = p.id) as movs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estrategias e WHERE e.processoId = p.id) as estrats
FROM processos p JOIN clientes c ON p.clienteId = c.id WHERE LOWER(c.nomeCompleto) LIKE '%maeve%' ORDER BY p.id;
